task: Promote three post-merge feedback checks to required pre-merge CI gates (GAP-81 failure class)

gates_added.description: Gate 1: Static scan of new migration SQL files for CREATE TABLE with operating_company_id but no ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY
gates_added.failure_class: GAP-81: missing RLS on new carrier-scoped tables

gates_added.description: Gate 2: Validates tsconfig.json strict=true + no bare @ts-ignore bypasses + tsc --noEmit compile check
Gate 3: Scans new migration SQL files for GRANT ... TO <role> referencing roles not in the canonical Neon allowed list
gates_added.failure_class: GAP-81: unknown GRANT roles causing migration apply-time failures
